SELECT today() AS current_date, curdate() AS alias_curdate, current_date() AS alias_current_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT x.date_field, today() AS current_date FROM (SELECT today() AS date_field) AS x;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_dates WHERE date_field = today();
SELECT if(date_field = today(), 'Today', 'Not Today') AS is_today FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE daily_metrics (event_date Date, metric UInt32);
SELECT d.event_date, sum(m.metric) FROM daily_metrics m JOIN (SELECT today() AS event_date) d ON m.event_date = d.event_date GROUP BY d.event_date;
SELECT today() AS current_date, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_dates) AS t WHERE t.date_field = today();
SELECT distinct date_field FROM (SELECT today() AS today_date UNION ALL SELECT date_field FROM test_dates) AS combined;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (id UInt32, created_at DateTime);
INSERT INTO temp_table VALUES (1, now()), (2, now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY);
SELECT if(created_at >= today(), 'Today or Future', 'Past') AS date_status FROM temp_table;
SELECT today() AS current_date, COUNT(*) FROM temp_table WHERE created_at >= today();
SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM test_dates WHERE date_field = today()) AS today_count, (SELECT count(*) FROM test_dates) AS total_count;
